response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of strong full-stack software engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and diverse stacks, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of production GenAI/LLM systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or cloud-native AI design on AWS/GCP/Azure at the depth a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role demands. Customer-facing technical leadership is also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: 15+ years shipping production software in TypeScript/Node.js with strong craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Proven autonomy and breadth: founder of GISCollective, workshop instructor, multi-domain delivery
concerns: No explicit production GenAI, RAG, or vector database experience listed
Limited evidence of major cloud platform AI system design (only AWS CDK mentioned for pricing work)
No clear customer-facing discovery or stakeholder-leadership experience at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Missing explicit RAG / vector DB / LLM production experience
Recent MCP and agentic workflow tooling work
